name: Amazons
author: Walter Zamkauskas (1988) / AGP port
description: The Game of the Amazons (Walter Zamkauskas, 1988) on a 10x10 board. Each turn one of your four amazons moves like a chess queen and then shoots an arrow (also queen-style) that permanently blocks a square. Nothing is captured; the first player who cannot move loses. A move is a three-step path: amazon, its destination, then the arrow's target.
